description: Hand-labeled prompts for evaluating auto_context.py precision/recall. Each prompt maps to the top-3 files a competent engineer would open first to work on that task. expected_files is ordered by relevance — the most-likely-first-open is index 0.

prompts.prompt: add rate limiting to the login endpoint so users can't brute force passwords
prompts.notes: rate_limit_decorator already wraps handle_login in router.py; user wants tighter limit on /login

prompts.prompt: where is hash_password defined and which files call it
prompts.notes: hash_password lives in crypto.py; login.py uses verify_password from same module

prompts.prompt: make the session TTL configurable per environment via the Settings class
prompts.notes: Settings.session_ttl lives in settings.py; create_session reads it

prompts.prompt: refactor find_user_by_email to use async database queries
prompts.notes: find_user_by_email lives in queries.py, called from login.py, uses get_db_connection

prompts.prompt: auth_middleware should log the user_id not just warn on unauth
add a created_at column to the users table via a new migration
prompts.notes: MIGRATIONS list in migrations.py; User model in models.py

prompts.prompt: register a /logout endpoint on APIRouter that invalidates the session
prompts.notes: APIRouter.add in router.py; SessionManager.invalidate in session.py

prompts.prompt: send a welcome email via EmailClient when a new user signs up
prompts.notes: send_email + EmailClient in email.py; signup-like flow lives near login.py

prompts.prompt: convert get_db_connection to use a connection pool and close idle conns
prompts.notes: get_db_connection + close_connection in database.py; callers in queries.py + migrations.py

prompts.prompt: expose RATE_LIMIT_CONFIG through the Settings object instead of a module constant
prompts.notes: RATE_LIMIT_CONFIG lives in rate_limit.py; Settings class in settings.py

prompts.prompt: verify_password returns True for empty string on malformed stored hash
prompts.notes: verify_password is in crypto.py; only caller is login.py validate_credentials

prompts.prompt: load_config should also read from process environment if .env missing
